ai_summary: Aksh Optifibre Limited submitted its routine quarterly compliance certificate for the period ending June 30, 2026, confirming adherence to SEBI Regulation 74(5) regarding shareholder dematerialization processes. The company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent, KFin Technologies, certified that all dematerialization requests were processed timely and correctly, including updating member registers and cancelling physical certificates. This is a standard regulatory filing indicating proper operational compliance, with no material impacts or red flags identified.
